notes: Passat B6/B7 3C uses its own Immo4D route and must not be treated as a normal PQ35 cluster job.
Identify keyed, slot-key and KESSY specification before preparing a key.
Confirm dashboard or access-start module type before accepting AKL work.
Blade and key family must be verified physically or by reliable part-number/VIN data.
Later MQB and MQB Evo coverage changes with tool and software support.
OBDSTAR officially confirms MQB48-5A AKL support using the RH850/V850 Adapter Kit, but this must be mapped to the exact fitted Passat B8 dashboard before upgrading the vehicle record.
OBDSTAR March 2026 coverage explicitly adds D70F3525-V5 Program Keys with C4-06 and online synchronisation-code calculation.
Do not extend MQB48-5A/5B evidence to MQB49-5C. OBDSTAR's current adapter documentation states the 5C route is not supported by that adapter.

official_evidence.source: OBDSTAR RH850/V850 Adapter Kit product documentation
official_evidence.scope: MQB48-5A/5B dashboard data reading and adapter requirements
MQB48-5A D70F3525-V5 Program Keys, AKL, C4-06 and online synchronisation calculation
MQB48-5A AKL with RH850/V850 Adapter Kit

research_gaps: Confirmed key part numbers and frequencies
Exact mapping of MQB48-5A evidence to Passat B8 dashboard variants
Tool-neutral adapter and bench connection verification
